```{r}

library(tidyverse)


read_dijkstra <- function(path) {
  
  d <- read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  d_block <- d |>
    group_by(participant, block) |>
    summarise(
      vivid = first(na.omit(as.character(main_vivid_key.keys)), default = NA_character_),
      compliance = first(na.omit(as.character(block_compliance_key.keys)), default = NA_character_),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    mutate(
      participant = as.character(participant),
      block = as.character(block)
    )
  
  d_trial <- d |>
    filter(!is.na(main_detect_key.keys)) |>
    mutate(
      id = as.character(participant),
      block = as.character(block),
      trial = as.numeric(trialInBlock),
      detectOri = str_to_lower(as.character(detectOri)),
      imagineOri = str_to_lower(as.character(imagineOri)),
      present = as.numeric(present),
      stimulus = case_when(
        present == 1 ~ "present",
        present == 0 ~ "absent",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      congruency = case_when(
        imagineOri == "none" ~ "none",
        detectOri == imagineOri ~ "congruent",
        detectOri != imagineOri ~ "incongruent",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      visLevel = as.character(visLevel),
      response = case_when(
        main_detect_key.keys == "right" ~ "present",
        main_detect_key.keys == "left" ~ "absent",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      corr = as.numeric(main_detect_key.corr),
      rt = as.numeric(main_detect_key.rt)
    ) |>
    select(
      id,
      block,
      trial,
      detectOri,
      imagineOri,
      present,
      stimulus,
      congruency,
      visLevel,
      response,
      corr,
      rt
    ) |>
      filter(rt > 0.1 & rt < 5)
  
  d_trial |>
    left_join(d_block, by = c("id" = "participant", "block" = "block")) |>
    mutate(
      compliance = str_to_lower(compliance),
      complied = case_when(
        compliance == "right" & imagineOri == "right" ~ "yes",
        compliance == "left"  & imagineOri == "left"  ~ "yes",
        compliance == "down"  & imagineOri == "none"  ~ "yes",
        is.na(compliance) | is.na(imagineOri) ~ NA_character_,
        TRUE ~ "no"
      )
    )
}

d <- list.files(
  path = "uebung-2/data/raw/",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
) |>
  map_dfr(read_dijkstra)

write_csv(d, "uebung-2/data/data_dijkstra_course.csv")

```
